results.rendered_html:
abhi-√vṛdh to grow higher than (acc.), surpass,  RV. ;  AV. i, 29, 1  (, perf. -vāvṛdhe for -vāvṛte cf.  RV. i, 174, 1 ), &c.;
to grow up, grow or increase more and more,  MBh.  &c.;
to prosper,  Mn.  & c.:
Caus. P. (aor. -avīvṛdhat) to increase, strengthen, render prosperous,  AV. i, 29, 1  and 3  (for abhi-√vṛt, cf.  RV. x, 174, 1  and 3 ),  MBh.  &c.

results.rendered_html:
abhivṛdh 1 A.
1 To grow, increase, be augmented; haviṣā kṛṣṇavartmeva bhūya evābhivardhate  Ms. 2. 94. 
2 To thrive, prosper (of men also); dātāro no'bhivardhaṃtāṃ vedāḥ saṃtatireva ca  Ms. 3. 259 ; 7. 27 ;  Y. 1. 245. 
— Caus.
1 To increase, augment, add to; kośaṃ, dharmaṃ, prītiṃ &c.
2 To stretch, extend, lengthen.
3 To bring up, rear.
